channel.title: Surged on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Surged on Tech Tracker

item.title: What is Shiba inu coin? How it's surged so high in short time?
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-cr7wvnvEvaQ/YYapZJb2atI/AAAAAAAAHNk/ckW78aXLeP4PvptCiXFpPPhpUKVBiQT5QCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1636215122345211-0.png" alt=""> Just like bitcoin the founder of Shibu Inu coin is not known except the name ryoshi, he liked to remain anonymous like Satoshi nakamoto which is the top reason behind the success of Shiba Inu even though the Shiba inu is a meme coin got inspired by Dogecoin which has no value at the start of launch in August 2020 but eventually Shiba Inu got amazing super growth when Elon Musk tweet about it.
